text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and I are on the way back to campus
after going out, when...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, Big Brother?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, Big Sister?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I don't want to say goodbye just yet...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I don't want to say goodbye just yet...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Actually, there's something I want to go see with
you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her expression is so sincere I can't say no.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head up to the academy rooftop to wait for
the sun to set.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: There's supposed to be a meteor shower today.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
As soon as I heard about it, I knew I had to watch
it with you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
As soon as I heard about it, I knew I had to watch
it with you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: There sure are a lot of clouds, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure enough, the sky is full of clouds everywhere I
look, forming an opaque wall over most of the
sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm a bit worried that she might blame the state of
the sky on herself, but..

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-hey, Big Brother?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-hey, Big Sister?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Will you wait with me just a bit longer?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Just until the clouds clear up... Until we can see
the sky.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at Rice Shower and realize my concern was
unfounded.
choice_data_list: We should each make a wish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at Rice Shower and realize my concern was
unfounded.
choice_data_list: We should each make a wish.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Stronger? W-what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Did I say something weird?
choice_data_list: You were able to tell me you wanted to wait.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, y-yeah. A while ago... I probably wouldn't
have been able to say that.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The old me probably would have started crying...
But I'm not like that anymore.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I decided that I wanted to see shooting stars with
you today...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I decided that I wanted to see shooting stars with
you today...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: And I won't give up until that happens.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah! Look! Look at the sky!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah! Look! Look at the sky!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The clouds have already disappeared, revealing a
night sky full of twinkling stars.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among the inviting flood of gleaming points, a
sudden streak of light plummets down. Then
another, and another.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wooow! There are so many shooting stars!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Definitely!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This is sure to be an unforgettable night for us.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad you're staying.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad you're staying.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...What are you going to wish for?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...What are you going to wish for?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! For me?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I didn't expect that, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It's similar to my wish.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
My wish... is for the happiness of everyone who
supports me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Including yours.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Including yours.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly, a glitter catches the corner of my eye.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Look! The sky...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Look! The sky...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unbeknownst to us, the sky cleared up during our
chat. When we look up, we see an ocean of stars.
And one falls out of the sky, then another... and
then a shower of them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wooow! There are so many shooting stars!
choice_data_list: We have to make our wishes!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and I both wish upon the rain of
falling stars.
